248 G6B G6B_USE_BEDRAILS (G6B) Bed Rails Used for Bed Mobility/Transfer CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: modes of transfer in last 7 days - bed rails for bed mobility/transfer. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
